notes: v37.1 Patch 1 — Sync protocol & persistence. BUG #1: setupBank detects legacy A1 blob before writing header, preventing data loss on Instructables-style deploys against pre-v37 sheets. BUG #6: new lookupFamily endpoint enables cross-family login routing on multi-family backends. BUG #7/FEAT-9: mode:no-cors removed from state POSTs — server rejections now surface as toasts instead of silent failures. BUG #9: destructive actions (primary transfer, self-delete) now await sync before logout/toast, and capture familyId at queue time to survive logout sequencing.
